actions.name: parseCsv
actions.label: Parse CSV to rows
actions.description: Takes a CSV string and returns its data rows as an array of objects, keyed by the header row. Use this to turn an uploaded or fetched CSV into structured records that a flow can iterate over. Makes no external API calls.

csv.title: CSV content
csv.description: The full CSV text, including the header row.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: Field delimiter. Defaults to a comma.

actions.name: arrayToCsv
actions.label: Save to CSV
actions.description: Takes an array of row objects and serialises it into a single CSV string, with a header row derived from the object keys. Use this to turn structured records back into a downloadable or storable CSV. Makes no external API calls.

rows.title: Rows
rows.description: The records to write. Each item is an object whose keys become CSV columns.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Optional explicit column order. If omitted, columns are the union of keys across all rows in first-seen order.

delimiter.title: Delimiter
delimiter.description: Field delimiter. Defaults to a comma.

actions.name: filterRows
actions.label: Filter rows
actions.description: Keeps only the rows where a chosen column satisfies a condition. Operators: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, empty, notEmpty. Use to drop blank or unwanted records before further processing. Makes no external API calls.

operator.title: Operator
operator.description: eq, ne, gt, gte, lt, lte, contains, empty, or notEmpty.

actions.name: mapColumns
actions.label: Rename columns
actions.description: Renames object keys using a mapping of old name to new name. Unmapped keys pass through unless dropUnmapped is true. Use to align CSV headers with the field names a downstream API expects. Makes no external API calls.

mapping.title: Mapping
mapping.description: An object of { oldKey: newKey } pairs.

actions.name: selectColumns
actions.label: Select columns
actions.description: Keeps only the listed columns, in the order given, and drops the rest. Use to send an API just the fields it needs. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: transformRows
actions.label: Clean and coerce rows
actions.description: Cleans row values: trims whitespace, converts listed columns to numbers or booleans, and fills empty cells with a default. CSV values arrive as strings, so use this to give them the right types before sending to an API. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: chunkRows
actions.label: Chunk rows into batches
actions.description: Splits an array of rows into batches of a given size. Useful for staying under the per-execution API request limit by processing one batch per flow run. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: validateRows
actions.label: Validate rows
actions.description: Splits rows into valid and invalid based on required (non-empty) columns. Invalid rows are returned with an _errors array explaining what failed. Use to catch bad data before it reaches an API. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: dedupeRows
actions.label: Deduplicate rows
actions.description: Removes duplicate rows by a key (a single column name or an array of column names), keeping the first occurrence. Makes no external API calls.

key.title: Key column(s)
key.description: One or more column names that define uniqueness.

actions.name: toJson
actions.label: Rows to JSON
actions.description: Serialises an array of rows into a JSON string, optionally pretty-printed. Use when a step or API expects JSON rather than CSV. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: fromJson
actions.label: JSON to rows
actions.description: Parses a JSON string into an array of rows. Accepts either a JSON array or an object wrapping an array under a 'rows' key. Makes no external API calls.

actions.name: summarizeRows
actions.label: Summarize rows
actions.description: Produces per-column statistics: non-empty count, distinct count, and numeric min/max/sum where values parse as numbers. Use to inspect what is in a file before processing it. Makes no external API calls.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Optional subset of columns to summarize.
